summary: Software engineer with hands-on experience prototyping and shipping AI-powered product features end-to-end in TypeScript, React, and Python with Postgres data layers. Built a production conversational AI platform and a RAG developer tool, including evaluation sets, latency optimization, and monitoring for deployed AI systems. User-focused, with a track record of translating experiment findings into product improvements and quickly iterating from prototype to production.

skills.ml: LLMs (Claude, GPT-4o), RAG, LangChain, Vector Embeddings, Prompt Engineering, Model Evaluation, HuggingFace, XGBoost
skills.infra: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, REST APIs, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions CI/CD, AWS, GCP, Supabase

experience.title: Deep Learning Intern
bullets: Developed a YOLO-based object detection model in Python to detect and classify industrial pipe inventory from warehouse images, improving accuracy by 30% and eliminating a fully manual counting process.
Containerized the model with Docker and deployed on Kubernetes for horizontal scaling of model inference, enabling the team to handle variable load without code changes.

Built a data augmentation pipeline using NumPy and Pandas, scaling the training dataset from a few hundred to 10,000+ images and manually re-annotating 500+ edge cases; accuracy improved from 65% to 85.4% on held-out evaluation data.
Designed normalized relational database schemas in SQL to store image metadata and inference results, enabling cross-team queries on model performance and inventory trends.

projects.name: AI Interview Engine
projects.subtitle: Voice-First Candidate Screening Platform
projects.stack: Next.js, Express, Claude Sonnet/Haiku, Deepgram, Supabase, Railway, Vercel
bullets: Prototyped and shipped a full-stack AI-powered product end-to-end using React/Next.js, Express, and Supabase (Postgres): a multi-turn conversational AI engine with dynamic context injection that generates targeted, role-specific follow-up questions in real time from each candidate's parsed resume.

Engineered a real-time voice pipeline integrating Deepgram Nova-2 (speech-to-text) and Aura (text-to-speech) with Claude Sonnet 4.6, achieving 4-5s end-to-end latency per conversational turn, with iterative optimization to reduce response time.

Built an automated document ingestion pipeline (PDF parsing, Claude Haiku, MD5 deduplication caching) and a post-interview evaluation system scoring candidates across 4 dimensions with advance/hold/reject output; deployed full-stack on Railway, Vercel, and Supabase (PostgreSQL with Row-Level Security and Magic Link authentication) with Brevo SMTP for transactional email automation.

projects.name: CodeSyntax AI
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack RAG Developer Assistant
projects.stack: Python, FastAPI, Next.js, LangChain, Pinecone, Docker, GitHub Actions
bullets: Built a production retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system using GPT-4o-mini with semantic search over Python Docs, RealPython, and StackOverflow, indexed in Pinecone via OpenAI vector embeddings, exposed through a React/Next.js frontend.
Built a 55-question domain evaluation set and ran experiments comparing query intent classification and result re-ranking strategies via LangChain, measurably reducing off-topic responses.
Maintained 35+ pytest unit tests; GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline builds the Docker image and deploys to Railway (API) and Vercel (frontend) on every merge to main.

projects.name: AuthentiText
projects.subtitle: AI-Generated Text Detection Engine
projects.stack: Python, XGBoost, DistilBERT, HuggingFace, GCP, Docker
bullets: Trained a weighted ensemble model combining XGBoost (21 hand-crafted linguistic features: perplexity, burstiness, lexical density) with a fine-tuned DistilBERT transformer, achieving 99.1% F1 and 99.96% AUROC on held-out test data.

Conducted systematic model comparison across four architectures (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, DistilBERT) using ROC curves, confusion matrices, and SHAP feature importance; integrated Captum token-level attribution heatmaps for explainable AI.
Trained on the merged HC3 corpus spanning Wikipedia, Reddit, medicine, and finance domains; deployed as a publicly accessible machine learning inference app on HuggingFace Spaces.
